title: Personal User - update for headset is present
scenario: Verify that a personal user (logged in or Guest) using the mobile app can see and successfully perform a software update notification for a headset on outdated firmware.
steps: Download/install/log in to the mobile app.
Connect a device with outdated firmware.
Check the SW update status — the update should be present.
Tap the update button and complete the DFU process — the update should be performed successfully.
expected: A personal user (logged in or as Guest) using the mobile app can see a software update notification for a headset on outdated firmware, and the DFU update is performed successfully.
